|---------------------|-------------------------------------------------|
| Intent              | Find any blogs containing lorem ipsum text, then replace the lorem ipsum text with actual content.                             |

| Processing Priority | Sort by created, then lastUpdated               |
| Issue Preferences   | Don't care                 |
| PR Preferences      | Don't care.                    |
| Label               | `replace-ipsum-text-live-text`                      |
| Created             | 2026-03-12                    |
